description_long: This bonsai object features a dense, cloud-like canopy created by numerous flat, rectangular planes, each displaying printed images of cascading green foliage. The trunk is short and thick, emerging from a small, round pot with a textured, earthy appearance. The foliage is visually represented by overlapping cards, giving the impression of lush, trailing vines or leaves. Two smaller potted plants, one with a sunflower and another with leafy stems, are positioned at the base, adding variety and color. The overall structure is compact, with the foliage mass dominating the visual profile and the pots providing a stable base. The object combines naturalistic imagery with an abstract, layered construction, making it visually striking and unique.
description: A compact bonsai with a dense, layered canopy of printed foliage images, set in a small round pot, accompanied by two smaller potted plants at the base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full, dense canopy of overlapping foliage images, with both the sunflower and leafy potted plants clearly visible at the base.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thinness of the foliage planes and the layered, stacked arrangement, with the pots and plant stems visible in profile.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the foliage mass, showing more of the printed vine patterns and the main trunk emerging from the central pot.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again emphasizes the vertical stacking of the foliage planes and the arrangement of the two smaller potted plants.
attribute_pot_type: The main pot is round, appears to be made of ceramic or clay, with a natural, unglazed finish and earthy brown color. The two smaller pots are also round, one with a stone-like texture and the other with a smoother, brownish surface.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is short and thick, with a slight natural curve, resembling an informal upright style but without dramatic bends or twists.
attribute_branch_arrangement: The branches are abstractly represented by the arrangement of flat planes, creating a dense, cloud-like canopy with no clear tiering or radial pattern.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is visually dense, with overlapping planes giving a lush, full impression throughout the canopy.
